# uapi_mwan3_policy (Data Source)

Look up the mwan3 policy.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_mwan3_policy" "example" {
  id = "<id>"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Resource id to look up.

### Read-Only

- `etag` (String) Opaque ETag of the resource's current state.
- `last_resort` (String) uci option last_resort.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
- `use_members` (List of String) uci option use_members.
